changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE stock_quant (
id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
product_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
location_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
lot_id BIGINT,
quantity NUMERIC(18,4) NOT NULL,
reserved_quantity NUMERIC(18,4) DEFAULT 0,
CONSTRAINT fk_quant_product FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES product(id),
CONSTRAINT fk_quant_location FOREIGN KEY (location_id) REFERENCES stock_location(id),
CONSTRAINT fk_quant_lot FOREIGN KEY (lot_id) REFERENCES stock_lot(id) );
